title: Enterprise HRMS
subtitle: rgstaff.reddington.global.com
description: End-to-end Human Resource Management System covering attendance, payroll, leave management, and employee records — replacing all manual HR operations across departments. Coordinated biometric hardware integration with phased rollout across 300+ users.

caseStudy.problem: All HR operations — attendance, payroll, leave approvals — were handled manually via spreadsheets, causing errors and delays.
caseStudy.solution: Designed and delivered a full HRMS with biometric hardware integration, role-based dashboards, and automated payroll generation.

title: Lead Management System
subtitle: oliviams.cloud
description: Scalable multi-role lead tracking platform for tele-calling teams built with a phased rollout. Reduced manual tracking effort by 40% through workflow automation, structured process documentation, and real-time status pipelines.

caseStudy.problem: Sales team was losing leads due to fragmented spreadsheet workflows and no standardised follow-up or escalation process.
caseStudy.solution: Deployed a CRM on AWS EC2 with phased rollout, role-based access, real-time notifications, and workflow automation.

title: 3 Production Websites
subtitle: reddington.global.com · rgcare.in · rgdebtrelief.com
description: Planned and tracked simultaneous delivery of 3 live corporate sites — Reddington Global (consultancy), RG Care (NGO platform), and RG US Debt Relief (financial advisory). Managed project risks and quality outcomes, sharing regular progress reports with stakeholders.

caseStudy.problem: The organisation needed 3 distinct digital presences — corporate, NGO, and financial — all delivered in parallel with shared infrastructure.
caseStudy.solution: Coordinated design, development, and deployment across 3 websites simultaneously, maintaining quality and timeline parity for all.

title: ML Data Pipeline & Insights
subtitle: Skolar Internship Project · Apr – Jun 2024
description: Built structured data pipelines and analytical reporting systems during a 92-day internship. Applied Pandas, NumPy, and Scikit-learn to transform raw datasets into actionable business intelligence, with interactive visualisations presented to stakeholders.

caseStudy.problem: Raw operational data sat in siloed files with no structured way to extract trends or actionable insights for business decisions.
caseStudy.solution: Built automated pipelines and classification models, producing visualised reports used directly in stakeholder decision-making.
